home.title: STARY IKARUS
home.subtitle: THE OLD ICARUS
home.tagline: Folk-rock journeys through time and myth.

about.title: About the Band
about.section1_text:
Stary Ikarus has been active since February 2009 and consists of four Russian and Ukrainian musicians. Inspired by Greek mythology about Icarus, they believe that Icarus did not die after falling into the sea, but entered the realm of Poseidon, spent several centuries there, and then returned to land. Now he is older and wiser, but still alive and helping people.

Over ten years of existence, the band has created a diverse and meaningful repertoire of original songs and performed in Germany and Poland. Their music combines folk-rock with elements of blues, jazz, and psychedelia, creating a unique sonic space where each composition is a philosophical journey.
about.section2_text:
The band's musical style is defined as Art-Rock, Folk-Rock, or Indie — each listener can define it themselves. The band believes that music is a language that speaks directly to the soul. Each track contains deeply philosophical lyrics inspired by ancient Greek mythology, inviting the listener to contemplate life, death, love, and eternity.

The compositions blend world folk elements with contemporary sounds, creating a bridge between past and future, between myth and reality.

music.title: Music
music.album1_description: Our debut album, where we present our philosophy and sound.
music.album2_description: Our second album, exploring ancient myths in the context of the modern world.
music.album3_description: Our third album, completing the trilogy about Icarus's journey.
